source_note: Extracted from the per-section tabs (CDS-A through CDS-J) of the commondataset.org Common Data Set Excel template. Unlike the Answer Sheet-based canonical schema, this does not include canonical question_numbers. Canonical ID assignment for this year requires a separate cross-reference step against the 2025-26 Answer Sheet schema.
